overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a fantasy RPG showing student wizards in robes conversing on castle grounds near a training pitch. The stationary camera captures medieval towers with red and gold striped walls, decorative pennant banners, and lush green grass under a partly cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary on a grassy castle training ground, capturing two groups of student wizards conversing. On the left, three students in dark robes stand together, while on the right, three others interact near a broomstick. The background features impressive medieval architecture including a gold-roofed tower, red-striped central tower, and stone fortifications adorned with pennant banners under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a vibrant castle training ground where student wizards gather under a partly cloudy sky. It begins by framing the lush green expanse, capturing two distinct groups of students in dark robes engaged in conversation. As the eye wanders across the scene, the focus shifts from the students on the left toward a second group interacting near a broomstick on the right. The perspective then expands to reveal the imposing medieval architecture in the background, showcasing stone fortifications and towers with red-striped walls and gold roofs. Finally, the view settles on the decorative pennant banners fluttering against the horizon, completing the portrait of the academic grounds.
